title: 自机角色全buff相关
summary: 哈喽大家这里是lala，最近看到很多超链者对伊瑟中的buff有些疑惑，本期攻略lala就带着大家一起从图标区别说到各图标中的效果分类，点赞收藏，我们发车！图标区别无框：按照文字描述判断能否被驱散绿框：无论文字是否有说明，该效果都无法被驱散蓝色图标：增益效果/buff红色图标：减益效果/debuff黄
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"哈喽大家这里是lala，最近看到很多超链者对伊瑟中的buff有些疑惑，本期攻略lala就带着大家一起从图标区别说到各图标中的效果分类，点赞收藏，我们发车！"}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-1","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"图标区别","bold":true}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"无框：按照文字描述判断能否被驱散"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"绿框：无论文字是否有说明，该效果都无法被驱散"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蓝色图标：增益效果/buff"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"红色图标：减益效果/debuff"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"黄色图标：特殊小机制"}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-1","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"图标效果分类","bold":true}]},{"type":"header2","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"◆黄色图标"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真：反制→","bold":true},{"text":"反击率提升100%，反击时对目标附加一回合禁止治疗"},{"type":"image","key":"JZ5vyK3e7gzwRDNG","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_494/h_253/50364/878729/2025/8/2/545120.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"494px","height":"253px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"缬草：朦胧梦境→"},{"text":"朦胧梦境持续时间内，缬草无法行动，只会受到伤害，队友回合开始时为其附加缬草最大生命值护盾与一种未拥有的基础增益效果；任意友方阵亡时，结束朦胧梦境，并恢复其20%最大生命。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"YjVShpZGJmg3GKxV","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_503/h_724/50364/878729/2025/8/2/90131.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"503px","height":"724px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"拂秋：月迷津→"},{"text":"友方 t":""},{"type":"image","key":"Bb0PSX0ot8PUIqhD","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_489/h_189/50364/878729/2025/8/2/109330.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"489px","height":"189px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"免伤类"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"无敌→"},{"text":"免疫所有伤害"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"WldfbYatxZAuKFeH","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_500/h_150/50364/878729/2025/8/2/432024.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"500px","height":"150px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"纸人守护→"},{"text":"受到攻击时，消耗一层使伤害额外降低35%，最多叠加五层"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"ngfAXj8yBELW4H7M","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_493/h_237/50364/878729/2025/8/2/723984.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"493px","height":"237px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"行动条相关："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"提琴颂→","bold":true},{"text":"免疫行动条击退/偷取效果，回合结束时增加其他队友5%行动进度"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"出现：幻音千明","bold":true}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"riCaB8ld0f6uVmTS","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_491/h_234/50364/878729/2025/8/2/599573.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"491px","height":"234px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"免疫相关："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"免疫→","bold":true},{"text":"不会被附加任何减益，免疫增加冷却与行动条击退"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"GRf77nHWIc65D2Un","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_519/h_206/50364/878729/2025/8/2/151237.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"519px","height":"206px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"梦寐→"},{"text":"被附加减益时，消耗一层避免，最多叠加三层"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"tqNTBQ3bxG1z79wA","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_505/h_193/50364/878729/2025/8/2/655305.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"505px","height":"193px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"备份→"},{"text":"有减益效果的友方行动前，消耗一层净化三个减益效果，并附加一层数据流；最多叠加6层，不可被驱散"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"oju37CEWtr0rMRS1","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_488/h_317/50364/878729/2025/8/2/822399.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"488px","height":"317px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"增伤相关："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"数据流→","bold":true},{"text":"每层提升2.5%伤害及2.5点速度，最高叠加12层，不可被驱散"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"vezTVF9C1IbV5iOl","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_499/h_228/50364/878729/2025/8/2/264122.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"499px","height":"228px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"技能联动相关："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蝰蛇：蛇鳞→","bold":true},{"text":"战斗开始获得两层，使用普攻时获得一层；叠加4层时，下次反击改为使用终结技"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"9f7fkBFUppJ4chyj","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_496/h_233/50364/878729/2025/8/2/604040.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"496px","height":"233px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"提亚马特：终焉形态→"},{"text":"拥有时改变形态，期间每次行动对敌方全体造成自身生命上限15%的伤害并额外造成自身生命上限13%的真实伤害，回复总计伤害量20%的生命。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"每回合结束时失去2层浴血，后续每回合失去层数翻倍，归零时退出该形态；此效果不可被驱散"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"YPXModicZk1BmwH4","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_509/h_445/50364/878729/2025/8/2/141940.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"509px","height":"445px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"罗喉：忿火→"},{"text":"每层提升自身5%的防御，最多叠加12层，不可被驱散。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"其他友方攻击后，罗睺有50%概率消耗一层忿火进行协战。触发时达到4层，将该队友的一个减益效果转移至目标；触发时达到6层，可额外消耗一层再转移一个减益效果；触发时达到8层，自身每比敌方高4%防御，伤害结果+1%，最多+40%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"3t2HOf5POqCh9Dy9","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_501/h_663/50364/878729/2025/8/2/446841.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"501px","height":"663px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"安德鲁：怒震→"},{"text":"每层使终结技额外提升16%最终伤害，最多叠加10层；触发后移除此效果；不可被驱散"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"YHjzFZQ905IN3xBs","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_494/h_286/50364/878729/2025/8/2/510540.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"494px","height":"286px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-4","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header2","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"◆红色图标"}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"text":"基础减益效果："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这里我们以基础增益相反效果来定义"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"攻击下降→","bold":true},{"text":"攻击下降40%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"SEYWNmJlphqKl9Me","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_519/h_156/50364/878729/2025/8/2/698126.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"519px","height":"156px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"防御下降→"},{"text":"防御下降60%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"180fygoHQtLrcDht","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_511/h_151/50364/878729/2025/8/2/467515.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"511px","height":"151px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"速度下降→"},{"text":"速度降低30%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"cOB7yC9Uqt4bWxyE","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_517/h_166/50364/878729/2025/8/2/519812.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"517px","height":"166px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"暴击率下降→"},{"text":"暴击率下降30%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"mag60bAWRx4TBN7m","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_525/h_164/50364/878729/2025/8/2/15003.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"525px","height":"164px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"除了这几个外还有一个基础相关增益"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"抵抗下降→","bold":true},{"text":"效果抵抗降低40%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"S37NCzC3qBKYfqVS","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_501/h_152/50364/878729/2025/8/2/450222.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"501px","height":"152px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"控制相关："}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"text":"硬控类","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"眩晕→"},{"text":"无法行动"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"tVCeZCt2Ih169mkx","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_510/h_165/50364/878729/2025/8/2/203855.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"510px","height":"165px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"冰冻→"},{"text":"无法行动，无法被拉条"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"mXFVp7n6fd0QFgUW","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_502/h_196/50364/878729/2025/8/2/509936.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"502px","height":"196px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"深度冻结→"},{"text":"无法行动，无法被拉条；回合开始时生命值低于50%，则延长一回合，该效果仅触发一次"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"F691ScX9a4PYlaof","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_494/h_320/50364/878729/2025/8/2/255950.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"494px","height":"320px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"睡眠→"},{"text":"无法行动，受伤时解除；若受伤解除，则此次伤害提高25%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"T9JVEMijhvqUtLhy","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_494/h_236/50364/878729/2025/8/2/841912.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"494px","height":"236px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"软控类"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"嘲讽→"},{"text":"对嘲讽目标释放普攻，无法进行其他额外行动"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"loMBaw8uDqohrQuG","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_490/h_188/50364/878729/2025/8/2/762077.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"490px","height":"188px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"沉默→"},{"text":"只能释放普攻"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"fCO3lyJJYevd6Ist","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_490/h_153/50364/878729/2025/8/2/640497.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"490px","height":"153px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"限制类"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"禁止治疗→"},{"text":"无法被治疗"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"HkhGM5782EMg8h0o","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_508/h_160/50364/878729/2025/8/2/959834.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"508px","height":"160px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"闭锁→"},{"text":"不会被附加任何增益"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"UIvYzqljIJJlqy9p","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_500/h_156/50364/878729/2025/8/2/22127.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"500px","height":"156px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"遗忘→"},{"text":"所有被动效果失效"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"ZKHgfryyHn2nK1YR","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_494/h_150/50364/878729/2025/8/2/752886.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"494px","height":"150px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"增伤相关："}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"text":"通用类","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"易伤→"},{"text":"受到伤害提升30%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"3WggBfSoyIpeCxIP","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_519/h_157/50364/878729/2025/8/2/888897.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"519px","height":"157px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"梦魇→"},{"text":"受到伤害提升15%；攻击者恢复伤害量15%的生命"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"OTM42ckbkIpAIVX4","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_499/h_237/50364/878729/2025/8/2/650224.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"499px","height":"237px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"残蚀→"},{"text":"受到暴击伤害时，消耗1层，额外附加攻击方60%攻击的真实伤害，并拉条攻击方6%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"pwwMvVVL3ytTjx7p","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_504/h_363/50364/878729/2025/8/2/815456.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"504px","height":"363px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"普攻类"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"刃心花→"},{"text":"受到的普攻伤害额外增加15%；作为主目标被暴击时，敌方荼蘼会使用普攻追击"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"gywWjjrWWCN4P4UM","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_505/h_285/50364/878729/2025/8/2/649607.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"505px","height":"285px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"暴击类"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"遗言→"},{"text":"被暴击率+7%，受到的暴击伤害提升7%，最多叠加4层"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"5EmCAozTzYeq3FXs","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_509/h_238/50364/878729/2025/8/2/638442.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"509px","height":"238px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"增减伤一体相关："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"克洛斯：骇入进度/骇入→","bold":true},{"text":"每层提升5%受到的伤害，额外降低10%造成伤害，最多叠加三层；叠加三层时，转化为两回合骇入"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拥有骇入时无法被附加骇入进度，提升25%受到伤害，额外降低40%造成伤害，不可被驱散"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"wEFTNLLr2zoDaX1a","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_493/h_628/50364/878729/2025/8/2/468648.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"493px","height":"628px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"柯洛罗：锁链束缚→"},{"text":"受到柯洛罗造成的伤害提升30%；对柯洛罗造成的伤害额外降低30%的"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"zy8WgMQOjVocLJMq","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_495/h_236/50364/878729/2025/8/2/258620.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"495px","height":"236px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"持续伤害相关："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"持续伤害→","bold":true},{"text":"回回合开始时受到最大生命值百分比的真实伤害"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"cAhYGkjjgUqeEq7J","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_509/h_198/50364/878729/2025/8/2/425368.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"509px","height":"198px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"流血→"},{"text":"回合开始时受到附加者攻击100%的间接伤害"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"q7oFPnxSWKNzGs40","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_501/h_200/50364/878729/2025/8/2/195271.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"501px","height":"200px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]
